meta.title: TruthAI — Arabic AI Content Detection
meta.description: The only platform purpose-built for Emirati Arabic AI content detection across the GCC

hero.title: Detect AI-Generated Content
hero.subtitle: in Emirati & Gulf Arabic
hero.description: The only platform capable of distinguishing human writing from AI in Emirati dialect, Gulf Arabic, and MSA — with full Arabic-English code-switching support
hero.trusted: Trusted by institutions across UAE, KSA, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar & Oman

dialect.title: Emirati Dialect Detection
dialect.description: We recognize Emirati dialect markers: «وايد» (very), «جذي» (like this), «شلونك» (how are you), «يبيلك» (you need), «عيل» (so), «ماكو» (there isn't)

codeswitching.title: Arabic-English Code-Switching
codeswitching.description: We handle mixed-language text combining Arabic and English as commonly found in Emirati everyday writing

accuracy.title: High Accuracy
accuracy.description: Model specifically trained on Gulf Arabic texts for the highest detection accuracy

realtime.title: Real-Time Analysis
realtime.description: Results in seconds with sentence-level breakdown

analyze.title: Analyze Text
analyze.paste_placeholder: Type or paste Arabic text here... Example: وايد زين هالموضوع، بس لازم نشوف إذا كتبه إنسان ولا الذكاء الاصطناعي

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the right plan for you

errors.word_limit: You've exceeded the word limit for the free plan. Please upgrade to continue.
errors.monthly_limit: You've reached your monthly free check limit.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps to get an accurate result
how_it_works.step1_desc: Paste any Arabic text — Emirati, Gulf, MSA, or mixed. Free plan supports up to 500 words.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our AI analyzes the text across four levels: full-text structure, paragraphs, sentences, and Arabic vocabulary.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Get human-writing percentage, Emirati dialect detection, red & green flags, and per-sentence analysis.
